title: viola fluehmannii
intro: Viola fluehmannii, also known as Flueck's pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viola fluehmannii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Viola fluehmannii can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
